description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by a well-landscaped yard with numerous trees and shrubs. The house features a dark, gabled roof and a symmetrical facade with multiple windows, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps leading up to the main door, flanked by decorative columns and landscaping. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by privacy hedges and additional greenery. A driveway leads up to the house, lined with evenly spaced trees, and there is a detached garage or outbuilding visible on the property. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood, with ample outdoor space and attention to architectural detail.
description: A large, elegant two-story house with a gabled roof, landscaped yard, front porch, and backyard pool, set in a tree-lined suburban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, symmetrical windows, and tree-lined driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, privacy hedges, and detached outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, large windows, and landscaped backyard.
description_view_3: Side/front view with the driveway, garage, and a partial view of the front entry and pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, decorative columns, and landscaped approach
